prompt_text: Write a recommendation letter for Brad who is applying to a design program. Mention creativity and iteration based feedback.
response_text:
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
[Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Title]
[Design Program Name]
[Program Address]

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing to wholeheartedly recommend Brad for admission to your esteemed design program. As Brad's [supervisor/mentor/teacher], I have had the pleasure of observing and guiding his growth as a designer over the past [X] years, and I can confidently attest to his exceptional creativity, dedication, and passion for design.

Throughout his time in our program, Brad has consistently demonstrated a unique ability to think creatively and approach problems from innovative angles. His designs are not only aesthetically pleasing but also functional, user-centered, and well-researched. He has a keen eye for detail and a deep understanding of the design process, which enables him to iterate and refine his ideas with ease.

One of Brad's greatest strengths is his ability to receive and incorporate feedback. He is an exemplary student who thrives on constructive criticism and uses it as an opportunity to learn and grow. He is not afraid to take risks and try new approaches, and he is always willing to iterate and refine his designs based on feedback from peers, instructors, and clients. This ability to receive and incorporate feedback has allowed him to develop a unique design voice and style that is both distinctive and effective.

In addition to his technical skills and creative abilities, Brad is an exceptional communicator and collaborator. He is able to effectively articulate his design decisions and vision to both technical and non-technical stakeholders, and he is always willing to lend a hand or offer guidance to his peers. His positive attitude, work ethic, and dedication to the design process make him an invaluable asset to any team.

I have no doubt that Brad would be an excellent fit for your design program. His passion for design, combined with his creativity, iteration-based feedback, and exceptional communication skills, make him an ideal candidate for success in your program. I strongly recommend him for admission and am confident that he will make valuable contributions to your community.

If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to contact me. I would be more than happy to provide any additional information or support.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
